title: Wayfarer dark
description:
Dive into the immersive world of "The Wayfarer," where every step you take unveils new wonders and challenges. This modpack is a perfect blend of adventuring, fun.

Centered around Create and Create Aeronautics
body:
Dive into the immersive world of "The Wayfarer," where every step you take unveils new wonders and challenges. This modpack is a perfect blend of adventuring, fun, exploring, and the thrill of building and engineering. Get ready to experience a Minecraft journey like never before, with a myriad of features that will keep you hooked for hours on end.

This is a lite version of the modpack The Wayfarer. Mostly vanilla with Create and basic mods for cooking, farming, exploring and such.
